source.subject: subject_058 (Multi-Garment_dataset_02)
source.license: NON-COMMERCIAL RESEARCH ONLY — see NOTICE.md. Must be replaced before any commercial use.

topology.note: Topology is shared ('in correspondence') across all 47 MGN t-shirts; only body-shape deformation differs (~3.5cm mean between subjects).

coordinate_frame.note: Mesh is stored canonical (spread-arm, ~0.91m wide bbox, centred at origin), NOT in the scan's posed world space. Drops directly onto a pose=0 SMPL body with no registration.

reference_body_params.model: SMPL neutral (MGN uses the neutral model, not gendered)
reference_body_params.note: Near-mean build. Manikan's pipeline uses GENDERED SMPL (male/female), so for binding, project this garment onto the pipeline's own beta=0 body rather than reconstructing this neutral body. The small proportion mismatch is absorbed by the nearest-point binding + push-out.

control_regions.note: NOT yet tagged. To be defined for size-chart morphing (Stage B): chest ring, hem loop, left/right cuff loops, shoulder loop, plus free_edges (hem, cuffs, collar) for optional Tier 1.5 jiggle. Can be derived programmatically from the canonical mesh (Y-bands + boundary-loop detection) instead of hand-tagging.
